name: Pizza Bianca
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Crushed dried red pepper flakes
1 lb Fontina or Gruyere cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sprinkle yeast and sugar over water. Stir to dissolve.
2. Add salt and mix to blend.
3. Gradually add 2 1/2 cups flour and oil, mixing until the dough forms a ball and cleans the sides of the bowl. Add more flour, 1 tablespoon at a time if necessary, for about 5 minutes.
4. Continue mixing until the dough is smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes. Cover and let stand in a warm, draft-free area for 1 hour.
5. Process all remaining ingredients (except cheese) until smooth, stopping to scrape down sides of the bowl as needed, about 1 minute.
6. Roll each round of dough on a lightly floured surface into a circle that is 1/8-inch thick.
7. Transfer to a cake rack or any flat perforated pan. Spread with sauce and sprinkle with cheese.
8. Bake until edges of pizzas are lightly browned, about 10 minutes. Serve immediately.
